Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
All measured parameters are within normal limits for this patient’s age and sex. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid profile are unremarkable. No evidence of microalbuminuria. No acute or chronic laboratory abnormalities detected at this time.
